{{Quote|Aleema's donations are what have kept more than one Alliance operation from folding. His prestige and clout as the galaxy's premiere shockball player keeps him virtually invulnerable to suspicion, and he is therefore relatively secure in his position as an agent.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to Ytavarg Aleema|<ref name="CRO" />}}
The '''Keed''' were a [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Keedad]]. They shared their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] with [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] since the early history of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Around [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]], the Keed/Human [[Hybrid/Legends|hybrid]] [[Ytavarg Aleema]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Keedad. [[Ger Plortor]], a scout for the [[Shad Furies/Legends|Shad Furies]] [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] team, recruited Aleema after witnessing him participate in a [[lettranin]] game on Keedad. Afterward, the Keed [[athlete]] eventually became the most renowned shockball player in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. At one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], after [[Death/Legends|killing]] a group of Human [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] agents in retaliation for their murder of a fellow [[Alien/Legends|alien]] shockball [[Ap Kormar|player]], Aleema also became a secret [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] patron and [[Foster Agent|agent]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Keed were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that could produce [[Reproduction/Legends|offspring]] with [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. A Keed/Human [[Hybrid/Legends|hybrid]] had a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] body plan with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and two legs. They had [[Color/Legends|light]]-colored skin, a ridged forehead, and folded facial structures near the nostrils of their broad [[Nose/Legends|nose]] as well as to the sides of their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. A hybrid's head could sport long dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Society and culture==
Members of the Keed society identified as belonging to at least one—male—[[Gender/Legends|gender]].<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
[[File:Auril_sector.jpg|thumb|left|300px|The Keed were native to Keedad, in the Auril sector.]]
The Keed were [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Keedad]] in<ref name="CRO" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Keedad system/Legends|Keedad system]]</ref> During the early history of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="CRO" /> which was [[Galactic Constitution Conference|established]] in [[25,053 BBY]],<ref name="SWTOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Keedad was [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by Humans. [[Ytavarg Aleema]] was a male Keed descendant of Keedad's Human inhabitants who was born on the planet<ref name="CRO" /> around [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].<ref name="26 BBY">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', which is set shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], gives [[Ytavarg Aleema]]'s age as 26 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, which corresponds to a [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] date of around [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> At one point, Aleema participated in a pick-up game of Keedad's local [[lettranin]] sport. The vacationing [[Ger Plortor]], a scout for the prominent, [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]–based [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] team the [[Shad Furies/Legends|Shad Furies]], who was watching the game, later recruited the Keed [[athlete]] for the team, and Aleema accompanied the scout to the Core Worlds.<ref name="CRO" />

==Keed in the galaxy==
{{Quote|His housing of agents at his home in Shad on Melinz, though a huge risk, has saved many deep undercover agents from capture. He is a great contact in the Core Worlds, where it has previously proven very difficult for Alliance operatives to move about.|Personal addendum by General Airen Cracken to an entry of a datafile detailing Rebel Alliance operatives dedicated to Ytavarg Aleema|<ref name="CRO" />}}
[[File:AirenCracken-WBCp4.png|thumb|right|300px|General Airen Cracken (pictured) included an entry on the Keed Ytavarg Aleema to a datafile detailing various Rebel Alliance operatives.]]
The Keed Ytavarg Aleema eventually became the most talented and renowned shockball player in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], with his face being known throughout the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="CRO" /> despite that government being generally [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], after a game between the Shad Furies and [[Quent Assassins]] teams, a group of seven Humans who appeared to be unruly Furies fans—but in reality were agents of an Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]—beat the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] Assassins player [[Ap Kormar]], who was suspected to have been a sympathizer of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], to [[Death/Legends|death]]. Aleema, who was appalled at the act and was attempting to protect Kormar, then used his shockball equipment to, in turn, kill all of the attackers.<ref name="CRO" />

After certain [[Politics/Legends|political]] maneuvering, the Keed was allowed back onto his team, but eventually he also became a valuable Rebel [[Foster Agent|foster agent]]. In that capacity, Aleema—while himself touring the Core Worlds with the Shad Furies—temporarily housed Rebel agents in need of shelter at his [[Ytavarg Aleema's mansion|mansion]] on<ref name="CRO" /> the Core Worlds<ref name="EAOC Melinz">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Melinz system/Legends|Melinz system]]</ref> celestial body [[Melinz]]. Additionally, the affluent athlete also funneled half of his [[Currency/Legends|income]] to the Rebel Alliance, and eventually, the Human Alliance [[General/Legends|general]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] added an entry dedicated to the Keed agent to a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Keed were created by [[Craig Robert Carey]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. In the book, the Keed Ytavarg Aleema was illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]].<ref name="CRO" />
